scope: New access-codes collection for storing generated codes
Course/Lesson schema updates for access code gate toggle
Admin dashboard for code generation and usage tracking
assumptions: Users collection already exists with authentication
Courses and Lessons collections exist with content
Admin panel infrastructure is available for new features
Students have unique email addresses for tracking
review_questions: Should access codes be single-use (one code per student) or multi-use (same code for multiple students from the same school)?
Should access codes work alongside existing subscription/access controls, or replace them when present?
If a code is deleted or modified by admin, should students who already redeemed it retain access?
Should there be a time expiration for codes, or are they valid indefinitely?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 18 (new collection, schema changes, admin UI, student UI, tracking), Risk: 8 (access control, not payments/auth), Novelty: 15 (new feature pattern), Cross-domain: 10 (backend + frontend + admin), Ambiguity: 2 (clear requirements), Dependencies: 5 (users, courses, lessons). Total: 58

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains detailed requirements with structured sections (Goal, Pre-Conditions, User Experience, Admin Requirements, Success Criteria). Multiple acceptance criteria are present. Promoted spec.md for gap analysis.
